{{Youmay|the [[Wikipedia:R-Zone|R-Zone]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]|''[[Star Wars: Imperial Assault]]'', the [[Fantasy Flight Games]] board game}}
'''''Star Wars: Imperial Assault''''' is a game created for [[Tiger Electronics]]' [[Wikipedia:R-Zone|R-Zone]] handheld gaming system, released in [[1997]]. Because of the system's many flaws, it plays like a Game and Watch version of [[X-Wing (game series)|''X-Wing'' game series]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''*''Take control of the Advanced TIE x 1 prototype!''''
''*''Dogfight with X-wings, Y-wings — even the ''Millennium Falcon''!''''
''*''Crush the Rebellion and restore order to the galaxy!''''
